headline: 1 Industrials Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. Their momentum is also rising as lower interest rates have incentivized higher capital spending. As a result, the industry has posted a 20.3% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 10.5 percentage points.

headline: A First Quarter Bloodbath For Home Builders
summary: Homebuilder stocks are down 20% as Q1 earnings miss and incentives hit margins.
